description: Update an existing network on a site.

schema.name: vlanId
schema.description: VLAN ID. Must be 1 for the default network and >= 2 for additional networks.

schema.name: dhcpGuarding
schema.description: DHCP Guarding settings for this Network. If this field is omitted or null, the feature is disabled

children.name: trustedDhcpServerIpAddresses
children.description: List of trusted DHCP server IP addresses.

schema.name: vlanId
schema.description: VLAN ID. Must be 1 for the default network and >= 2 for additional networks.

schema.name: dhcpGuarding
schema.description: DHCP Guarding settings for this Network. If this field is omitted or null, the feature is disabled

children.name: trustedDhcpServerIpAddresses
children.description: List of trusted DHCP server IP addresses.

schema.name: isolationEnabled
schema.description: Whether this network is isolated from all other networks.

schema.name: cellularBackupEnabled
schema.description: Whether this network is allowed to use cellular data when WAN connection(s) are down.

schema.name: zoneId
schema.description: Firewall zone ID associated with this Network.

schema.name: internetAccessEnabled
schema.description: Whether the internet access is allowed for the device on this network.

schema.name: mdnsForwardingEnabled
schema.description: Whether this network should participate in mDNS traffic forwarding.

schema.name: ipv4Configuration
schema.description: Details about IPv4 configuration for this Network.

children.name: autoScaleEnabled
children.description: Whether the Network can automatically scale its subnet size based on the number of active DHCP leases.

children.name: additionalHostIpSubnets
children.description: Additional host IP subnets assigned to this VLAN.

children.name: dhcpConfiguration
children.description: IPv4 DHCP configuration for this network. If this field is omitted or null, DHCP is not working and hosts must get an address statically or from another server in this broadcast domain.

schema.name: gatewayIpAddressOverride
schema.description: Gateway IP address provided to DHCP clients. If null, the default gateway will be assigned.

schema.name: dnsServerIpAddressesOverride
schema.description: List of DNS servers assigned to client devices by the DHCP server. If none are specified, they will be selected automatically.

schema.name: leaseTimeSeconds
schema.description: The lease time in seconds for addresses in this range.

schema.name: domainName
schema.description: Domain name that can be used to access network in the browser.

schema.name: pxeConfiguration
schema.description: Pre execution environment configuration for network boot

schema.name: ntpServerIpAddresses
schema.description: Network Time Protocol (NTP) server IP addresses.

schema.name: option43Value
schema.description: Custom DHCP option (43) — the value MUST be the UniFi Network application's host IP address.

schema.name: tftpServerAddress
schema.description: Trivial File Transfer Protocol (TFTP) server address — accepts a hostname, URL or IP address.

schema.name: timeOffsetSeconds
schema.description: Time offset in seconds from UTC.

schema.name: wpadUrl
schema.description: Web Proxy Auto-Discovery (WPAD) URL.

schema.name: winsServerIpAddresses
schema.description: Windows Internet Name Service (WINS) server IP addresses.

schema.name: dhcpServerIpAddresses
schema.description: DHCP Server IP addresses

children.name: ntpServerIpAddresses
children.description: Network Time Protocol (NTP) server IP addresses.

children.name: tftpServerAddress

children.name: wpadUrl
children.description: Web Proxy Auto-Discovery (WPAD) URL.

children.name: winsServerIpAddresses
children.description: Windows Internet Name Service (WINS) server IP addresses.

children.name: natOutboundIpAddressConfiguration
children.type: Array of object (WAN NAT Outbound Configuration)
children.description: List of NAT Outbound Configurations defining which IP addresses are used for NAT translation. This array must contain all WAN interfaces with `static` or `PPPoE` IPv4 connection configuration.

schema.name: ipAddressSelectionMode
schema.description: IP address selection mode which determines how the IP address will be selected from the group of IP addresses to translate the traffic on network using NAT.

schema.name: ipAddressSelectors
schema.description: List of IP addresses or address ranges which determines which IP addresses will be used to translate the traffic on network using NAT.

children.name: ipAddressSelectionMode
children.description: IP address selection mode which determines how the IP address will be selected from the group of IP addresses to translate the traffic on network using NAT.

schema.name: ipv6Configuration
schema.description: Details about IPv6 configuration for this Network. If this field is omitted or null then IPv6 is not configured on this Network.

schema.name: clientAddressAssignment
schema.description: Client Address Assignment

children.name: dhcpConfiguration
children.description: IPv6 DHCP configuration for this network. At least one addressing method must be active: either enable SLAAC or provide DHCP configuration. If this field is null, SLAAC must be enabled.

children.name: start
children.description: Start suffix of the DHCPv6 address pool.

children.name: stop
children.description: End suffix of the DHCPv6 address pool.

children.name: leaseTimeSeconds
children.description: The lease time in seconds for IP addresses in this range.

children.name: slaacEnabled
children.description: Allows devices to obtain IPv6 addresses via SLAAC (Stateless Address Autoconfiguration) without DHCPv6. At least one addressing method must be active: either enable SLAAC or provide DHCP configuration.

schema.name: routerAdvertisement
schema.description: Router advertisement. Without it, hosts will not autoconfigure addresses and will lack a default route even with DHCPv6.

children.name: priority
children.description: Router advertisement priority.

schema.name: dnsServerIpAddressesOverride
schema.description: The IPv6 DNS server addresses assigned to this Network. If none are specified, they will be selected automatically.

schema.name: additionalHostIpSubnets
schema.description: Additional host IP subnets assigned to this VLAN.

schema.name: prefixDelegationWanInterfaceId
schema.description: ID of the WAN interface from which the prefix is delegated.

schema.name: clientAddressAssignment
schema.description: Client Address Assignment

requestBody.name: vlanId
requestBody.description: VLAN ID. Must be 1 for the default network and >= 2 for additional networks.

requestBody.name: dhcpGuarding
requestBody.description: DHCP Guarding settings for this Network. If this field is omitted or null, the feature is disabled

children.name: trustedDhcpServerIpAddresses
children.description: List of trusted DHCP server IP addresses.

fields.name: vlanId
fields.description: VLAN ID. Must be 1 for the default network and >= 2 for additional networks.

fields.name: metadata
fields.type: object (User or system defined or orchestrated entity metadata)
fields.description: Orchestrated or System-defined configurable network support

fields.name: dhcpGuarding
fields.description: DHCP Guarding settings for this Network. If this field is omitted or null, the feature is disabled

children.name: trustedDhcpServerIpAddresses
children.description: List of trusted DHCP server IP addresses.

local.ansible:
- name: Update Network
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/networks/{networkId}"
    method: PUT
    body:
      management: string
      name: Default Network
      enabled: true
      vlanId: 0
      dhcpGuarding:
        trustedDhcpServerIpAddresses:
          - string
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.ansible:
- name: Update Network
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/networks/{networkId}"
    method: PUT
    body:
      management: string
      name: Default Network
      enabled: true
      vlanId: 0
      dhcpGuarding:
        trustedDhcpServerIpAddresses:
          - string
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
